goal: Sort N elements via divide-and-conquer merge in O(N log N) — guaranteed convergence.
failure_modes: O(N) auxiliary space — fails on memory-constrained streams
Not in-place — poor cache locality on large arrays
composition_rules: Requires spine role in any sorting organ (provides O(N log N) guarantee)
Can run in parallel with parallel_merge_sort variant
recommitment_cond: input_size exceeds available memory — switch to external merge sort
streaming input requires different sort strategy
